headline: Is L3Harris Technologies (LHX) A Bargain After New Army Orders?
summary: L3Harris Technologies (LHX) has drawn investor attention after receiving US$84 million in new U.S. Army orders for Next Generation Command and Control manpack Falcon systems, its second contract tied to the NGC2 program. See our latest analysis for L3Harris Technologies. Despite the fresh US$84 million NGC2 orders, L3Harris Technologies' share price has moved lower in the short term, with the 30 day share price return down 5.94% and the 90 day share price return down 18.02%, while the 1 year...
